summary: Comprehensive testing of currency conversion system completed successfully. All major features working: 148+ currencies, live exchange rates, conversion functionality, FX volatility indicators, historical charts, multi-currency portfolio tracking, and full UI integration.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 when no transactions exist to convert
minor_issues.impact: Minor - expected behavior when no data exists

passed_tests: Currency Converter page loads with 148+ currencies
POST /api/exchange/convert converts USD to INR correctly ($1,000 = ₹91,870)
Portfolio tab shows multi-currency tracking functionality
Live Rates tab displays current rates
Portfolio asset creation and management works
All CRUD operations for transactions and budgets work
Analytics, tax estimation, and reporting endpoints work
UI navigation between tabs works seamlessly
